q.en: At the beginning, what makes the little fir tree wish he were taller and grander?
q.zh: 开头时，是什么让小冷杉树希望自己更高大、更气派？

options.en: The tall oak tree and the other evergreen trees around him
options.zh: 他身旁那棵高大的橡树和其他常绿树

options.en: A bird singing in his branches
options.zh: 一只在他枝头唱歌的鸟

explain.en: The book says, 'The tall oak made him want to be taller and grander. The other evergreen trees seemed to laugh at him for being so small.'
explain.zh: 书里说：「高大的橡树让他想长得更高大、更气派。其他常绿树好像在笑他太小了。」

q.en: A bird tells the fir tree a tale about evergreens. What does the bird say happens to them?
q.zh: 一只鸟给冷杉树讲了一个关于常绿树的故事。鸟说它们会经历什么？

options.en: They are taken into warm homes, dressed in finery, while people laugh and sing around them
options.zh: 它们被带进温暖的家，披上盛装，人们在周围欢笑、歌唱

options.en: They are planted in a desert
They are chopped for firewood and forgotten
options.zh: 它们被砍来当柴烧，然后被遗忘

explain.en: The bird 'told the fir tree a wonderful tale of seeing evergreens in warm homes, dressed in finery. The people would laugh and sing around the tree.'
explain.zh: 鸟「给冷杉树讲了一个奇妙的故事：它看到常绿树被请进温暖的家，披着盛装。人们围着树欢笑、歌唱。」

q.en: In the glossary, what does 'evergreen' mean?
q.zh: 在词汇表里，「evergreen（常绿树）」是什么意思？

options.en: A tree that loses its leaves in winter

explain.en: The glossary defines evergreen as 'green through all the seasons.'
explain.zh: 词汇表把 evergreen 定义为「一年四季都保持绿色」。

q.en: How does the family decorate the fir tree for the holiday?
q.zh: 这家人是如何装扮冷杉树来过节日的？

options.en: With colorful bulbs, wooden and glass ornaments, strings of popcorn and cranberries, holly, candy canes, gingerbread men, and a silver star on top
options.zh: 用五彩灯泡、木制和玻璃饰品、爆米花与蔓越莓串、冬青、拐杖糖、姜饼人，顶上还有一颗银星
什么都没有，让它光秃秃的

explain.en: They put 'shiny bulbs in every color,' wooden and glass ornaments, 'strings of popcorn, cranberries, and sprigs of holly,' candy canes and gingerbread men, and 'a bright, silver star at his top.'
explain.zh: 他们挂上「各种颜色的亮灯泡」、木制和玻璃饰品、「爆米花、蔓越莓串和冬青枝」、拐杖糖和姜饼人，以及「顶端一颗明亮的银星」。

q.en: How do the fir tree's feelings change from when he is chosen to when he is left outside?
q.zh: 从被选中到被丢在屋外，冷杉树的心情发生了怎样的变化？

options.en: From proud and excited on the special days to lonely and ignored, then longing to be decorated again
options.zh: 从过节那几天的骄傲、兴奋，变成孤独、被冷落，继而渴望再次被装扮

options.en: From scared to angry to happy
options.zh: 从害怕到生气再到开心

options.en: From sleepy to hungry to tired
options.zh: 从困倦到饥饿再到疲惫

explain.en: He felt 'so proud' and 'trembled with excitement' inside, then after twelve lonely days 'felt lonely and ignored,' and later 'longed to be decked in twinkling lights' again.
explain.zh: 他曾经「无比骄傲」、内心「兴奋得发抖」，之后孤独地过了十二天「感到孤独、被冷落」，后来「渴望再次披上闪烁的彩灯」。

q.en: After the holiday, how many days does the fir tree spend feeling lonely and ignored before the family takes him outside?
q.zh: 节日过后，冷杉树在被家人搬出去之前，孤独、被冷落地过了多少天？

explain.en: The book says, 'Twelve days passed with the fir tree feeling lonely and ignored,' before 'on the twelfth morning' they took down his lights and ornaments.
explain.zh: 书里说：「冷杉树孤独、被冷落地过了十二天」，直到「第十二天早晨」家人才摘下彩灯和饰品。

q.en: In the glossary, what does 'marveled' mean?
q.zh: 在词汇表里，「marveled」是什么意思？

explain.en: The glossary defines marveled as 'looked with awe or amazement'—the children 'marveled over their gifts.'
explain.zh: 词汇表把 marveled 定义为「带着惊叹、好奇地看」——孩子们「对着礼物惊叹不已」。

q.en: Why do you think the author shows the fir tree feeling lonely and ignored after the happy holiday?
q.zh: 你觉得作者为什么要写冷杉树在欢乐的节日之后感到孤独、被冷落？

options.en: To show that special, happy moments don't last forever and to make readers feel for the tree
options.zh: 为了表现那些特别、欢乐的时刻不会永远持续，并让读者对树产生共情

options.en: To teach how to decorate a tree
To explain how to plant a garden

explain.en: After the glory of the holiday, the tree 'felt lonely and ignored' for twelve days, which contrasts the joy and shows the reader that even a 'chosen' tree experiences loss and longing.
explain.zh: 在节日的辉煌之后，树「感到孤独、被冷落」地过了十二天，与之前的欢乐形成对比，让读者看到即使是「被选中」的树也会经历失落与渴望。

q.en: What happens to the fir tree and the garden in the spring?
q.zh: 春天里，冷杉树和花园发生了什么？

options.en: Spring rain tickles him, the sun shines, a woman from the family plants seeds that begin to grow, and the tree rejoices even as his own life ends
options.zh: 春雨逗弄他的枝叶，阳光照耀，那家的女主人在他旁翻土播种、种子发芽，树欢欣不已，尽管自己的生命也走到尽头

options.en: He is brought back inside and decorated again
options.zh: 他被搬回屋里，再次被装扮

explain.en: In spring, 'the fir tree felt his needles... tickled by a spring rain,' a woman 'furrowed the dirt... to plant a garden,' seeds grew, and the tree said 'Now life is beginning again,' though he felt 'his own life coming to an end.'
explain.zh: 春天里，「冷杉树感到针叶被春雨逗得发痒」，一位女主人「翻土……种下花园」，种子发芽，树说「生命又开始了」，尽管他感到「自己的生命正走向终点」。

q.en: This book is an adapted version of a famous story. Whose work is it based on?
q.zh: 这本书是一个著名故事的改编版。它是根据谁的作品改编的？

options.en: Hans Christian Andersen's 'The Fir Tree' (1845), adapted by Annette Carruthers
options.zh: 安徒生(Hans Christian Andersen)的《冷杉树》(1845)，由 Annette Carruthers 改编

options.en: An anonymous folktale with no author
options.zh: 一则没有作者的民间故事

explain.en: The book says it was 'Adapted by Annette Carruthers from Hans Christian Andersen's The Fir Tree (1845).'
explain.zh: 书里写道，它是「由 Annette Carruthers 改编自安徒生的《冷杉树》(1845)」。

prompt.en: The fir tree spent his two 'most glorious days' wishing they would never end, but they did. Think of a special day or moment in your own life that you wished would last forever. Why was it special, and what did you learn when it ended? Connect your idea to the fir tree's experience.
prompt.zh: 冷杉树度过了他「最辉煌的两天」，希望它们永不结束，但它们还是结束了。想一想你生活中那段希望永远停留的特殊日子或时刻。它为什么特别？当它结束时你学到了什么？把你的想法和冷杉树的经历联系起来。

en: The fir tree called the holiday 'the two most glorious days of his life' and later 'longed to be decked in twinkling lights' again (p. 13).
After the holiday he felt 'lonely and ignored' for twelve days before being put outside (p. 11).
A good answer shares a personal special moment and reflects on how happy times pass but can be remembered.
zh: 冷杉树把节日称为「他生命中最辉煌的两天」，后来还「渴望再次披上闪烁的彩灯」（第13页）。
节后他「孤独、被冷落」地过了十二天，才被搬到屋外（第11页）。
好的回答会分享一段个人的特殊时光，并反思欢乐的时光虽会过去，却可以被记住。
